title: Golden Hour Portraits
description: A portrait set built around warm sidewalks, long shadows, and quiet confidence just before sunset.

photos.title: Window Light
photos.alt: A stylized portrait placeholder of a subject near a bright window at golden hour.
photos.caption: Soft side light and a still frame make the gesture carry the image.

photos.title: Corner Turn
photos.alt: A stylized portrait placeholder of a subject turning at a city corner in warm evening light.
photos.caption: A simple step and glance back turns the street into a stage.
